featured.headline: Pentagon runs AI propaganda mill targeting Latin America while Congress eyes bipartisan AI expansion
featured.dek: As lawmakers craft bipartisan AI legislation, Pentagon deploys artificial intelligence for propaganda operations across Latin America with little oversight.
